items.description: An early prototype alternative to Microsoft/Windows Recall, built to run 100% locally with zero cloud communication. Captures screen snapshots, extracts text via WinRT OCR, and indexes embeddings into SQLite. Query your history conversationally via your local LLM (LM Studio). Under active development.
